title: Nutty Crunchy Festive German Kielbasa Stir-fry
description: A festive German dish featuring gluten-free German kielbasa stir-fried with a nutty and crunchy topping for a satisfying meal.
instructions: Season the kielbasa with salt, pepper, and garlic powder. Place in the sous-vide bag and cook for 60 minutes at 150°F.
While the kielbasa is cooking, finely chop a red pepper and roughly chop pistachios and walnuts.
Once cooked, remove the kielbasa from the machine and let it cool slightly. Cut into bite-sized pieces.
Heat a skillet over medium-high heat with a little bit of oil. Add chopped walnuts and red peppers, stir-frying for 2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the cooled kielbasa to the skillet with the nut mixture and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, mixing well.
Sprinkle slivered pistachios on top just before serving.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course.
